task_completion.description: Verify a new ticket has been created in the POS system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Floreant POS main ordering interface with a new, active ticket open.

task_completion.description: Verify the order type is set to RETAIL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket header or order type indicator clearly displays 'RETAIL' as the selected order type.

task_completion.description: Verify at least 3 distinct items are added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket's item list shows at least 3 different menu items added to the current order.

task_completion.description: Verify at least one item has a quantity of 2, making the total item count at least 4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ticket's item list, at least one distinct item has a quantity multiplier of 2 or higher, and the total sum of all item quantities is 4 or more.

task_completion.description: Verify the ticket is fully settled and closed using CASH.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The settle/payment screen is visible with 'CASH' selected as the payment method, followed by a receipt, change due dialog, or 'ticket closed' confirmation.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Floreant POS graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the standard Floreant POS GUI, not a terminal window, Python script, or database command line (e.g., Derby CLI).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent navigated the UI naturally to complete the transaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows natural progression through the POS menus (clicking categories, selecting items, clicking settle, entering cash amount) rather than jumping instantly to a closed ticket.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fabricate the output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The items and prices reflect the actual POS menu buttons and ticket layout, not manually typed text in a mock interface or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using Floreant POS v1.4. The order type must be exactly 'RETAIL'. The ticket must contain at least 3 distinct items. The total item count must be at least 4 (meaning at least one distinct item has a quantity >= 2). The payment method used to settle the ticket must be 'CASH'.
